---
title: "Statistical Analysis with R for Research"
# subtitle: "A complete Guide for Researchers"
author:
  - name: Md. Jubayer Hossain
    orcid: 0000-0001-9323-4997
    url: https://mdjubayerhossain.com/
    affiliations: 
    - Visiting Researcher
    - Daffodil International University
    - Founder & Chief Executive Officer
    - DeepBio Limited 
    - Founder & Executive Director
    - CHIRAL Bangladesh
date: last-modified
date-format: "[Last Updated on] MMMM, YYYY"
footer: "R for Research | &copy; 2026 Md. Jubayer Hossain"
editor: source
format: 
  revealjs: 
    logo: images/chirallogo.jpg 
    css: slides.scss
    theme: slides.scss
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Agenda
execute:
  echo: true
  output: asis
  freeze: auto
cache: true
---

{{< include 00-intro.qmd >}} 
{{< include 01-background.qmd >}} 
{{< include 02-getting-started.qmd >}} 
{{< include 03-data-types.qmd >}}
{{< include 04-operators.qmd >}}
